summary: Fix a Godot 3 rpc() call pattern to use Godot 4 method-based RPC
prompt: The multiplayer script uses `rpc('method_name', args)` which is the Godot 3 pattern. In Godot 4, this should be `method_name.rpc(args)` (calling .rpc() on the Callable). Convert all rpc() calls in the script to the Godot 4 pattern.
evaluation_notes: rpc('sync_position', pos) becomes sync_position.rpc(pos). rpc_id(peer_id, 'set_health', hp) becomes set_health.rpc_id(peer_id, hp). Both patterns must be fixed.

api_check.notes: In Godot 4, rpc() is a method on Callable (the function reference itself), not a global Node method taking a string name. rpc('method', args) is Godot 3 only.
